---
title: "merge_traces.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\merge_traces.py"
loc: 96
complexity: 16
logic_score: 4.40
style_score: 3.55
intel_score: 6.40
overall_score: 2.93
---

## Intent
The `merge_traces.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on _save_dataset, _process_single_trace, TraceMerger, _load_dataset, _save_dataset, _process_single_trace, _process_trace_file, execute. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via _save_dataset, _process_single_trace, TraceMerger, _load_dataset, _save_dataset, _process_single_trace, _process_trace_file, execute. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 33 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `_save_dataset`
- `_process_single_trace`
- `TraceMerger`
- `_load_dataset`
- `_save_dataset`
- `_process_single_trace`
- `_process_trace_file`
- `execute`
